SEARCH
程序包 com.bstek.ureport.dsl

类 ReportParserBaseVisitor<T>

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<T>
com.bstek.ureport.dsl.ReportParserBaseVisitor<T>
类型参数:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
所有已实现的接口:
ReportParserVisitor<T>, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
直接已知子类:
ExpressionVisitor
public class ReportParserBaseVisitor<T> extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<T> implements ReportParserVisitor<T>
This class provides an empty implementation of ReportParserVisitor, which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    ReportParserBaseVisitor()
     

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    T
    visitAbsolute(ReportParserParser.AbsoluteContext ctx)
    Visit a parse tree produced by the absolute labeled alternative in ReportParserParser.cellIndicator().
    T

    Visit a parse tree produced by ReportParserParser.aggregate().

    • visitEntry

      public T visitEntry(ReportParserParser.EntryContext ctx)
      Visit a parse tree produced by ReportParserParser.entry().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.

      指定者:
      visitEntry 在接口中 ReportParserVisitor<T>
      参数:
      ctx - the parse tree
      返回:
      the visitor result
